TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Alang_Mu_Dgiyaq, title = Alang_Mu_Dgiyaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alang_Mu_Dgiyaq} }

S.FORM: Alang mu gaga dgiyaq. Alang mu gaga siyo bobo yayung. Hbaro seediq ka alang mu, egu sapah duri. Malu bale qtaan, malu bale nniqan na duri. Alang Seediq Tgdaya ka alang mu, kika hbaro ba Seediq nami yami Tgdaya gaga msuupu mniq alang hini. Rmnengo ka tama mu rudan, "uxe hini ka alang rudan ta cbeyo, pneyah ta alang Truwan meyah theruy alang hini, yaani wada niqan mmsepac kmxalan hari knkawas ka nniqan ta hini" di mesa. Mdrumuc bale qmeepah ka seediq alang nami hini, ado bgurah ka dheran hini, kika mhuma ani maanu we malu kanna, so ka paye mdengu, wano yami hini ka meyah paye tbula ma, niqan baso, macu, bunga, sari, srqemu, sama, ricah, brkawe, bluqun, cadu, tlahi, malu bale ka hnreyan na kanna. Kiya, saya de ani ima meyah kmbarux dheran ma phmaun daha beluh, tomato, ucik, sama ma ocya, brigun daha ma pryuxun daha pila. Kika kndudun egu ka seediq pneyah uciicin meyah meniq alang nami hini saya di. Alang gaga pckaun dgiyaq ka alang nami, uxe alang cbeyo hayan, bbuyu qhuni harung kanna, kika kesun daha "alang bbuyu qhuni harung" ka alang hini. Qhuni harung niqan daha klegan, kingal we harung bale, kingal ge harung trabus, qhuni harung bale kesun malu ba sptahu puniq, qhuni harung trabus we malu ba saangal eruc sapah, prading meyah theruy hini ka rudan ta cbeyo we, harung trabus ka wada malu ba spheyu sapah, yaani wada mkere ba ka qhuni trabus nii ma msderux duri. Niqan yayung paru ka berah alang nami, mesa ka bubu mu rudan, "cbeyo mosa ku mahu yayung klaali, paanun mu bruru ka ppheyan mu saun mu mahu siyo yayung, mhedu ku mahu de paanun mu bruru dungan, saun mu mhido nganguc sapah. Rbagan de mosa nami lmanguy yayung, mosa nami qmerac qcurux, karang ma bolung yayung duri. Netun so qmuyux paru de so ba uxe heya denu, madis rnecux ma mrmusaq ka qsiya yayung, mapa btunux ma qhuni paru, daun na mnais kanna ka qnpahan seediq ma hako, so ba smiicu." Kuxun riyung saan rmigo seediq pneyah icin ka alang dgiyaq saya, ye niqan nanaq knmalu na Gaya ka"seediq tnpusu Taywang"hini, niqan bgihur malu ba sknexan ma qsiya malu ba mahun duri. Saya, ga nami kmbeyax smluhe kari nami nanaq ma, smluhe ndaan rudan nami cbeyo, so ka tminun pala, kmeeki ma muuyas uyas Seediq, niqan bale rilih daha kanna. Pusu bale we malu lnglungan kanna ka seediq alang dgiyaq.
S.PHON: alaŇč mu gaga dgijaq. alaŇč mu gaga sijo bobo jajuŇč. ńßba…ĺo s…ô…ôdiq ka alaŇč mu, …ôgu sapańß du…ĺi. malu bal…ô qtaan, malu bal…ô nniqan na du…ĺi. alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja ka alaŇč mu, kika ńßba…ĺo ba s…ô…ôdiq nami jami tgdaja gaga msuupu mniq alaŇč ńßini. …ĺmn…ôŇčo ka tama mu …ĺudan, "ux…ô ńßini ka alaŇč …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo, pn…ôańß ta alaŇč t…ĺuwan m…ôańß tńß…ô…ĺuj alaŇč ńßini, jaani wada niqan mms…ôpa ¶ kmxalan ńßa…ĺi knkawas ka nniqan ta ńßini" di m…ôsa. md…ĺumu ¶ bal…ô qm…ô…ôpańß ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč nami ńßini, ado bgu…ĺańß ka dńß…ô…ĺan ńßini, kika mńßuma ani maanu w…ô malu kanna, so ka paj…ô md…ôŇču, wano jami ńßini ka m…ôańß paj…ô tbula ma, niqan baso, ma ¶u, buŇča, sa…ĺi, s…ĺq…ômu, sama, …ĺi ¶ańß, b…ĺkaw…ô, bluqun, ¶adu, tlańßi, malu bal…ô ka ńßn…ĺ…ôan na kanna. kija, saja d…ô ani ima m…ôańß kmba…ĺux dńß…ô…ĺan ma pńßmaun dańßa b…ôluńß, tomato, u ¶ik, sama ma o ¶ja, b…ĺigun dańßa ma p…ĺjuxun dańßa pila. kika kndudun …ôgu ka s…ô…ôdiq pn…ôańß u ¶ii ¶in m…ôańß m…ôniq alaŇč nami ńßini saja di. alaŇč gaga p ¶kaun dgijaq ka alaŇč nami, ux…ô alaŇč ¶b…ôo ńßajan, bbuju qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč kanna, kika k…ôsun dańßa "alaŇč bbuju qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč" ka alaŇč ńßini. qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč niqan dańßa kl…ôgan, kiŇčal w…ô ńßa…ĺuŇč bal…ô, kiŇčal g…ô ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus, qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč bal…ô k…ôsun malu ba sptańßu puniq, qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus w…ô malu ba saaŇčal …ô…ĺu ¶ sapańß, p…ĺadiŇč m…ôańß tńß…ô…ĺuj ńßini ka …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo w…ô, ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus ka wada malu ba spńß…ôu sapańß, jaani wada mk…ô…ĺ…ô ba ka qńßuni t…ĺabus nii ma msd…ô…ĺux du…ĺi. niqan jajuŇč pa…ĺu ka b…ô…ĺańß alaŇč nami, m…ôsa ka bubu mu …ĺudan, " ¶b…ôo mosa ku mańßu jajuŇč klaali, paanun mu b…ĺu…ĺu ka ppńß…ôan mu saun mu mańßu sijo jajuŇč, mńß…ôdu ku mańßu d…ô paanun mu b…ĺu…ĺu duŇčan, saun mu mńßido ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß. …ĺbagan d…ô mosa nami lmaŇčuj jajuŇč, mosa nami qm…ô…ĺa ¶ q ¶u…ĺux, ka…ĺaŇč ma boluŇč jajuŇč du…ĺi. n…ôtun so qmujux pa…ĺu d…ô so ba ux…ô ńß…ôa d…ônu, madis …ĺn…ô ¶ux ma m…ĺmusaq ka qsija jajuŇč, mapa btunux ma qńßuni pa…ĺu, daun na mnais kanna ka qnpańßan s…ô…ôdiq ma ńßako, so ba smii ¶u." kuxun …ĺijuŇč saan …ĺmigo s…ô…ôdiq pn…ôańß i ¶in ka alaŇč dgijaq saja, j…ô niqan nanaq knmalu na gaja ka"s…ô…ôdiq tnpusu tajwaŇč"ńßini, niqan bgińßu…ĺ malu ba skn…ôxan ma qsija malu ba mańßun du…ĺi. saja, ga nami kmb…ôax smluńß…ô ka…ĺi nami nanaq ma, smluńß…ô ndaan …ĺudan nami ¶b…ôo, so ka tminun pala, km…ô…ôki ma muujas ujas s…ô…ôdiq, niqan bal…ô …ĺilińß dańßa kanna. pusu bal…ô w…ô malu lŇčluŇčan kanna ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč dgijaq.
S.FORM: Alang mu gaga dgiyaq. Alang mu gaga siyo bobo yayung. Hbaro seediq ka alang mu, egu sapah duri. Malu bale qtaan, malu bale nniqan na duri. Alang Seediq Tgdaya ka alang mu, kika hbaro ba Seediq nami yami Tgdaya gaga msuupu mniq alang hini. Rmnengo ka tama mu rudan, "uxe hini ka alang rudan ta cbeyo, pneyah ta alang Truwan meyah theruy alang hini, yaani wada niqan mmsepac kmxalan hari knkawas ka nniqan ta hini" di mesa. Mdrumuc bale qmeepah ka seediq alang nami hini, ado bgurah ka dheran hini, kika mhuma ani maanu we malu kanna, so ka paye mdengu, wano yami hini ka meyah paye tbula ma, niqan baso, macu, bunga, sari, srqemu, sama, ricah, brkawe, bluqun, cadu, tlahi, malu bale ka hnreyan na kanna. Kiya, saya de ani ima meyah kmbarux dheran ma phmaun daha beluh, tomato, ucik, sama ma ocya, brigun daha ma pryuxun daha pila. Kika kndudun egu ka seediq pneyah uciicin meyah meniq alang nami hini saya di. Alang gaga pckaun dgiyaq ka alang nami, uxe alang cbeyo hayan, bbuyu qhuni harung kanna, kika kesun daha "alang bbuyu qhuni harung" ka alang hini. Qhuni harung niqan daha klegan, kingal we harung bale, kingal ge harung trabus, qhuni harung bale kesun malu ba sptahu puniq, qhuni harung trabus we malu ba saangal eruc sapah, prading meyah theruy hini ka rudan ta cbeyo we, harung trabus ka wada malu ba spheyu sapah, yaani wada mkere ba ka qhuni trabus nii ma msderux duri. Niqan yayung paru ka berah alang nami, mesa ka bubu mu rudan, "cbeyo mosa ku mahu yayung klaali, paanun mu bruru ka ppheyan mu saun mu mahu siyo yayung, mhedu ku mahu de paanun mu bruru dungan, saun mu mhido nganguc sapah. Rbagan de mosa nami lmanguy yayung, mosa nami qmerac qcurux, karang ma bolung yayung duri. Netun so qmuyux paru de so ba uxe heya denu, madis rnecux ma mrmusaq ka qsiya yayung, mapa btunux ma qhuni paru, daun na mnais kanna ka qnpahan seediq ma hako, so ba smiicu." Kuxun riyung saan rmigo seediq pneyah icin ka alang dgiyaq saya, ye niqan nanaq knmalu na Gaya ka"seediq tnpusu Taywang"hini, niqan bgihur malu ba sknexan ma qsiya malu ba mahun duri. Saya, ga nami kmbeyax smluhe kari nami nanaq ma, smluhe ndaan rudan nami cbeyo, so ka tminun pala, kmeeki ma muuyas uyas Seediq, niqan bale rilih daha kanna. Pusu bale we malu lnglungan kanna ka seediq alang dgiyaq.
S.PHON: alaŇč mu gaga dgijaq. alaŇč mu gaga sijo bobo jajuŇč. ńßba…ĺo s…ô…ôdiq ka alaŇč mu, …ôgu sapańß du…ĺi. malu bal…ô qtaan, malu bal…ô nniqan na du…ĺi. alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja ka alaŇč mu, kika ńßba…ĺo ba s…ô…ôdiq nami jami tgdaja gaga msuupu mniq alaŇč ńßini. …ĺmn…ôŇčo ka tama mu …ĺudan, "ux…ô ńßini ka alaŇč …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo, pn…ôańß ta alaŇč t…ĺuwan m…ôańß tńß…ô…ĺuj alaŇč ńßini, jaani wada niqan mms…ôpa ¶ kmxalan ńßa…ĺi knkawas ka nniqan ta ńßini" di m…ôsa. md…ĺumu ¶ bal…ô qm…ô…ôpańß ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč nami ńßini, ado bgu…ĺańß ka dńß…ô…ĺan ńßini, kika mńßuma ani maanu w…ô malu kanna, so ka paj…ô md…ôŇču, wano jami ńßini ka m…ôańß paj…ô tbula ma, niqan baso, ma ¶u, buŇča, sa…ĺi, s…ĺq…ômu, sama, …ĺi ¶ańß, b…ĺkaw…ô, bluqun, ¶adu, tlańßi, malu bal…ô ka ńßn…ĺ…ôan na kanna. kija, saja d…ô ani ima m…ôańß kmba…ĺux dńß…ô…ĺan ma pńßmaun dańßa b…ôluńß, tomato, u ¶ik, sama ma o ¶ja, b…ĺigun dańßa ma p…ĺjuxun dańßa pila. kika kndudun …ôgu ka s…ô…ôdiq pn…ôańß u ¶ii ¶in m…ôańß m…ôniq alaŇč nami ńßini saja di. alaŇč gaga p ¶kaun dgijaq ka alaŇč nami, ux…ô alaŇč ¶b…ôo ńßajan, bbuju qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč kanna, kika k…ôsun dańßa "alaŇč bbuju qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč" ka alaŇč ńßini. qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč niqan dańßa kl…ôgan, kiŇčal w…ô ńßa…ĺuŇč bal…ô, kiŇčal g…ô ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus, qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč bal…ô k…ôsun malu ba sptańßu puniq, qńßuni ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus w…ô malu ba saaŇčal …ô…ĺu ¶ sapańß, p…ĺadiŇč m…ôańß tńß…ô…ĺuj ńßini ka …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo w…ô, ńßa…ĺuŇč t…ĺabus ka wada malu ba spńß…ôu sapańß, jaani wada mk…ô…ĺ…ô ba ka qńßuni t…ĺabus nii ma msd…ô…ĺux du…ĺi. niqan jajuŇč pa…ĺu ka b…ô…ĺańß alaŇč nami, m…ôsa ka bubu mu …ĺudan, " ¶b…ôo mosa ku mańßu jajuŇč klaali, paanun mu b…ĺu…ĺu ka ppńß…ôan mu saun mu mańßu sijo jajuŇč, mńß…ôdu ku mańßu d…ô paanun mu b…ĺu…ĺu duŇčan, saun mu mńßido ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß. …ĺbagan d…ô mosa nami lmaŇčuj jajuŇč, mosa nami qm…ô…ĺa ¶ q ¶u…ĺux, ka…ĺaŇč ma boluŇč jajuŇč du…ĺi. n…ôtun so qmujux pa…ĺu d…ô so ba ux…ô ńß…ôa d…ônu, madis …ĺn…ô ¶ux ma m…ĺmusaq ka qsija jajuŇč, mapa btunux ma qńßuni pa…ĺu, daun na mnais kanna ka qnpańßan s…ô…ôdiq ma ńßako, so ba smii ¶u." kuxun …ĺijuŇč saan …ĺmigo s…ô…ôdiq pn…ôańß i ¶in ka alaŇč dgijaq saja, j…ô niqan nanaq knmalu na gaja ka"s…ô…ôdiq tnpusu tajwaŇč"ńßini, niqan bgińßu…ĺ malu ba skn…ôxan ma qsija malu ba mańßun du…ĺi. saja, ga nami kmb…ôax smluńß…ô ka…ĺi nami nanaq ma, smluńß…ô ndaan …ĺudan nami ¶b…ôo, so ka tminun pala, km…ô…ôki ma muujas ujas s…ô…ôdiq, niqan bal…ô …ĺilińß dańßa kanna. pusu bal…ô w…ô malu lŇčluŇčan kanna ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč dgijaq.
